informacion.subtitle: Prepare for your visit to Jardín de las Delicias with everything you need for a safe and unforgettable adventure.
informacion.schedule_card_sub: Open every day so you can enjoy nature.
default_rules: No alcoholic beverages or controlled substances allowed.
Pets are not allowed (to protect native wildlife).
Campfires are only allowed in designated areas.
Take your trash with you. Help us keep the place clean.
Do not pick plants or disturb wildlife.
informacion.default_security_text: For your safety and to help conserve the protected area, it is strictly forbidden to leave marked trails or enter restricted zones without an authorized guide.
default_activities: Trekking and hiking through the jungle
informacion.default_gastronomy_text: Local community members prepare delicious traditional Creole food on weekends.
informacion.default_gastronomy_note: 🔥 We also offer grill rentals so you can cook your own barbecue.
default_what_to_bring: Comfortable clothes and hiking shoes with good grip (the terrain can be slippery).
Enough water to stay hydrated during the hikes.
Cash (no ATMs or reliable signal for transfers).
informacion.default_camping_text: Live the full experience sleeping under the stars. You can bring your own tent or rent one in the community.
informacion.footer_sub: Jardín de las Delicias is waiting for you.
